title: Hedgey Finance - Rekt
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by unauthorized token transfer on lending protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls createLockedCampaign() after a flash loan borrow in the same tx

monitoring_rules: BLOCK createLockedCampaign() if FLASHLOAN_BORROW detected in the same transaction
summary: Hedgey Finance suffered a $44.7 million flash loan attack where attackers manipulated the claimLockup parameter to approve unauthorized token transfers. A guard could have blocked such transactions by detecting a flash loan followed by a call to createLockedCampaign().
